raw_output:
PR #146 security review (Claude, Fable 5). NO FINDINGS. T-04 escape invariant holds at all three modified sinks (report_service.py:680,686,692): _esc outermost; _rating_label is a pure string map whose output introduces no HTML metacharacters, so mapping-before-escaping cannot unescape anything; existing sink-level XSS test test_weekly_escapes_consistency_ratings still passes with meaning intact (payload identity under map, escaped after, exactly 3 escaped occurrences, zero raw). No new interpolation holes (reflowed f-strings only reformat; numeric cells keep :.0f). No new network surface/endpoint/dependency (pyproject untouched)/logging. No .github/workflows or scripts/review_gate.py changes. T-16/T-02/T-01/T-07/T-08/T-13 untouched.

--- Post-review delta ---
Fix round commit 7fccf6a: P2 fixed — third mini-report pushes a synthetic underscore value (drift_rating='somewhat_inconsistent'; the renderer doesn't validate vocabulary membership) through the drift cell alone (sigma/delta render 'consistent'/'on target' so the mapped needle can only come from the drift cell). Mutation-verified by the orchestrator: dropping _rating_label at the drift call site now FAILS the test; restored, 3/3 rating tests pass. Nit dispositioned dismissed (order-swap benign: map output introduces no HTML metacharacters, escaped entities contain no underscores). Delta scope: backend/tests/test_report_service.py only. Post-fix verification: full backend pytest exit 0, mypy 0, ruff 0.
